revenue_segments.name: Consumer Transaction Revenue
revenue_segments.commentary: Decrease driven by a 54% decrease in consumer Trading Volume, offset by growth in derivatives trading volume and the launch of prediction markets trading.

revenue_segments.name: Institutional Transaction Revenue
revenue_segments.commentary: Increase driven by derivatives trading, mainly due to the acquisition of Deribit.

revenue_segments.name: Stablecoin Revenue
revenue_segments.commentary: Increase due to higher average USDC balances held by customers.

forward_guidance.text: The company expects continued growth in derivatives trading and stablecoin revenue, but faces challenges from declining consumer transaction volumes.

key_risks.description: The company faces risks from a highly evolving and uncertain regulatory landscape, which could impact its operations both in the United States and internationally.
Market risk exposure due to volatility in crypto asset prices, which could materially affect financial results.

recent_news.headline: Coinbase (COIN) Earnings: Latest Report, Earnings Call & Financials
recent_news.relevance_note: Discusses the recent earnings miss and financial performance.

recent_news.headline: Coinbase Global (COIN) Earnings Date and Reports 2026
recent_news.relevance_note: Provides future earnings forecasts for Coinbase.

recent_news.headline: Coinbase Global (COIN) Earnings Date & Report - Investing.com
recent_news.relevance_note: Reports on the Q1 2026 earnings miss and revenue shortfall.

bull_case: Growth in derivatives trading due to the acquisition of Deribit, which has increased institutional transaction revenue by 37%.
Stablecoin revenue increased by 11% due to higher average USDC balances, indicating strong customer engagement.
bear_case: Significant decline in consumer transaction revenue by 48% due to a decrease in consumer trading volume.
Overall transaction revenue decreased by 40%, reflecting challenges in maintaining trading volumes.
what_to_watch: Impact of regulatory changes on Coinbase's operations and revenue streams.
Performance of derivatives trading and its contribution to overall revenue growth.
Trends in consumer trading volumes and their impact on transaction revenue.
data_gaps: EPS estimate and revenue estimate for the next earnings period are not available.
